message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam packageStyle rectangle

actor "user" as User
rectangle "Wrapped" as Wrapped
rectangle "wrapped" as wrapped

User -> Wrapped : 1 predict(X)
activate Wrapped
    Wrapped -> Wrapped : 2 validate; strip
    Wrapped -> Wrapped : 3 predict(Xt)
    activate wrapped
    wrapped --> Wrapped : 4 yt
    deactivate wrapped
    Wrapped -> Wrapped : 5 add metadata
    Wrapped --> User : 6 y
deactivate Wrapped

@enduml
```
